ops.title: cc-guides pull-model architecture (v3.1) — plugin/guides pack + publisher-side cc-guides.toml in cc-skills, per-artifact layout.toml consumer config, repo lock file, JSON kind, per-repo daily re-render; settings.json fragment-rendered FLEET-COMPLETE 2026

ops.body:
Rebuilt 2026-07-10 (cc-guides v0.1.13, 21/21 fleet + cc-skills itself migrated, all green): fragments distribute like capt-hook packs, pull not push.

- **Pack**: cc-skills hosts `plugin/guides/{md,sh,json}/` (mirrors cc-notes' `plugin/hooks`), addressed via manifest `.claude/cc-guides.toml` (`guides = "plugin/guides"`, root fallback). Consumer spec `github:yasyf/cc-skills@main` — no path, resolver follows the manifest; explicit `//path` form still works for manifest-less repos. **No default source**: every layout.toml declares `[sources.cc-skills]`; fragments-FIRST, `[sources.*]` last (ErrFragmentsNested footgun). The v1 .src path is GONE as of v0.1.16 (2026-07-11, task 2a1cec27 done): renderV1/v1compat + transition default, migrate/init commands + internal/migrate+legacy packages, {{>}} directive machinery, and the legacy banner half (banner.go → marker.go) all deleted (−3300 LOC); a missing lock or missing lock entry is a hard invalid-input error.
- **Lock, not banners**: `.claude/fragments/cc-guides.lock` (schema/version/artifacts registry/sources with FULL 40-hex pins) carries all provenance. Artifacts get a version-free `GENERATED` marker (md/sh) or nothing (json, pristine — clobber-guarded via lock membership only). FULL render re-resolves + rebuilds/prunes the lock; PATH-SCOPED render freezes shared pins to the lock and errors on spec disagreement. Cache keys on full sha with prefix lookup for legacy sha12 pins. Code-only binary releases render byte-identical artifacts (lock-only diff → re-render skips commit; skip rule counts non-version/commit lock-diff lines with a pipefail-safe awk).
- **JSON kind**: strict parse, insertion-ordered deep merge (objects recursive, arrays union structural-dedupe never sorted, later-wins conflicts), stable encoding. `.claude/settings.json` = `cc-skills:settings-base` + `settings-{go,python,swift}` + local `settings-overrides` residue. Union cannot REMOVE (removals = move the key out of base). Since 2026-07-11 settings-base carries **NO hooks key** — capt-hook registration is plugin-canonical ([[hook-multi-fire-was-multi-source-registration]]); guard test `plugins/repo-bootstrap/tests/test_guides_fragments.py` reds re-growth. captain-hook is the one exception: fully-LOCAL settings fragment (dev repo, `.venv` launcher sole dispatcher, plugin disabled via `"captain-hook@captain-hook": false`).
- **settings-from-fragments FLEET-COMPLETE (2026-07-12)**: a hand-maintained settings.json is how the 9.0.0 migration half-applied — hooks block removed, plugin-canonical `enabledPlugins["captain-hook@captain-hook"]` never added, so capt-hook went fully dark (cc-skills b7d2e86, reposync 59f37f47; fixes-pack subagent auto-approve was the visible symptom). Fixed by rendering settings.json everywhere: 19 repos migrated in one fan-out (rescue-chai's stale pre-9.0.0 hooks block dropped — was double-registering; cc-vigil/write-like-me `cc-context@skills` strays normalized; real customizations preserved in overlays: cc-orchestrate self-plugin, cc-vigil xcodegen, ego deploy plugins, synonym-to-clicky bespoke keys). Overlay name convention = `settings-overrides.fragment.json` (getaway's `local` renamed; templates renamed in repo-bootstrap 0.44.0). Guards: `test_settings_json_is_a_rendered_artifact` + `test_captain_hook_plugin_stays_enabled` run in guides-lint.yml's `fragments-guard` job (repo-bootstrap 0.45.0, cc-skills c272a5de). RESOLVED 2026-07-14: yasyf.com onboarded via the settings-onboard workflow (commit 842a810, overlay `{}`, full standard — captain-hook + cc-context plugins on), and captain-hook migrated OFF its fully-local fragment onto base+python+overrides (141a84f): its overlay carries the 12-event `.venv/bin/hook` thin-client `hooks` block plus `captain-hook@captain-hook: false` (pyproject scripts: `hook` = thin per-event client, `capt-hook` = full CLI — a fragment briefly saying `capt-hook run <Event>` was mid-flight churn, not the intent). The action-v1 settings-in-lock guard is now UNBLOCKED. Ops lesson from the migration: TaskStop on a running workflow does NOT retract work its agent already pushed — verify origin after stopping. settings-onboard.js's step-7 gate now honors a custom overlay that deliberately pins the dev repo's plugin off (cc-skills 18a6fefd). `.claude/hooks/packs.toml` is mandatory for packs — absent file loads ZERO packs. Reusable single-repo onboarding: `/settings-onboard` workflow in cc-skills `.claude/workflows/`.
- **Pack-root README (cc-guides ≥0.1.20)**: `plugin/guides/README.md` is documentation, exempt from lint; `md/README.md` (any kind-dir README) is REJECTED — it would be resolvable as `alias:README`. The pack README documents the consumption model + fleet coverage boundary (excluded: homebrew-tap/-do/-summ, yasyf profile, landing-pages, gpt-do, summ; captain-hook behavioral exception — standard layout, overlay pins its own plugin off + carries the local hooks block).
- **Propagation**: `fleet.json` + `guides-fan-out.yml` deleted. Each repo's `guides.yml`: check job (`yasyf/cc-guides@action-v1`, lock-first, legacy-banner fallback for stragglers) + re-render (re-render.yml@action-v1, daily cron `17 9 * * *` + `repository_dispatch: [cc-guides-render]`). Propagation is PULL-ONLY (user rule 2026-07-14, [[never-sweep-guides-fleet]]): the guides-lint.yml fleet-dispatch runbook was deleted (c4f04c39) and the orphaned FLEET_DISPATCH_TOKEN secret removed; a single repo re-renders early via `gh workflow run guides.yml`, never a fleet loop. cc-skills gates pack purity via `guides-lint.yml` and is itself a consumer (root AGENTS.md = local intro + `cc-skills:ccx`; self-import pins main at render time). GHA cleanup (2026-07-11, cc-guides ≥0.1.18, action-v1 @abf82d46): shared `yasyf/cc-guides/install@action-v1` composite (version input latest|pinned) replaces the twin inline install blobs, and the render→lock-only-gate→commit→push-retry bash moved into the Go `cc-guides ci-render` subcommand (unit-tested classifier; re-render.yml is now checkout + install + ci-render + self-check).
- **claude-rules in the pack (2026-07-12)**: the CLAUDE.md routing stamp (@AGENTS.md include + Claude-Specific Rules + Task Tracking + Plan Execution & Orchestration/Models table) promoted from repo-bootstrap's local-fragment template into `plugin/guides/md/claude-rules.md`; ALL 41 active repos (23 consumers swapped + 18 non-consumers migrated, incl. crm/cc-sentiments-experiments/slop-cop/cc-sentiment which gained the stamp) render CLAUDE.md as `fragments = ["cc-skills:claude-rules"]`, repo-specific CLAUDE prose as a local fragment AFTER the import, repo prose normalized into AGENTS.md local fragments. repo-bootstrap 0.42.0 scaffolds the import (template fragment deleted; test_scaffold pins the pack copy via templates_dir.parents[4]). Manual fleet re-stamps are RETIRED — a stamp edit is one cc-skills commit; daily cron validated live 23/23 (`17 9 * * *` fires ~10:34Z, ~75min GitHub lag) with the guides-lint.yml dispatch one-liner for immediate pushes.
- Releases immutable, auto-tag `v0.1.<run#>` per main push ([[go-release-canonical-architecture]]); old pins verify forever (pinned tarballs immutable); `action-v1` advanced by hand. repo-bootstrap ≥0.41.0 scaffolds native layout dirs + settings-from-fragments (PINNED/LATEST → `install-binary-pinned`/`-latest`; diverged scripts use repo-LOCAL fragments — cc-context precedent: ensure_rg + migration shim). Zero `*.src.*` fleet-wide. Related: [[cc-guides-generated-claude-md]], [[plugin-cache-keys-on-version]].
